subcodes.first_line: In this day the breezes of the Kingdom are eloquently proclaiming this most exalted and blessed Word: Blessed is he whose strength the hosts could not weaken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز نسایم ملکوت باینکلمه مبارکه علیا ناطق طوبی لقوی مااضعفته الجنود و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
